title: Standardize error response format to JSONResponse with success/error fields

requirements: Standardize 6 endpoints to use consistent JSONResponse format
Replace HTTPException with JSONResponse({'success': False, 'error': message})
Ensure success responses use JSONResponse({'success': True, 'data': result})
Add error detail field for validation errors
Maintain backward compatibility with frontend expecting current format
acceptance: 6 test cases pass: verify by pytest novel_agent/tests/test_error_responses.py -v
All error responses JSON format: verify by rg 'JSONResponse.*success.*false'
No HTTPException in settings endpoints: verify by rg 'raise HTTPException' | grep -v settings
Consistent response schema: verify by jq '.success' test responses

shared_context.pattern: JSONResponse with {'success': bool, 'error': str, 'data': Any} schema
conventions: Use success boolean for client-side error handling
Add details field for validation errors

pre_analysis.action: Load context package for endpoint locations
Find endpoints using HTTPException vs JSONResponse

implementation_approach.title: Red Phase - Write failing tests for consistent error response format
implementation_approach.description: Write 6 test cases that verify consistent JSONResponse schema
modification_points: Create 1 test file: novel_agent/tests/test_error_responses.py with 6 test cases
Test 1-5: Schema validation tests for different endpoints
Test 6: Verify no HTTPException in settings endpoints
logic_flow: Write 6 test cases verifying JSONResponse schema
Run pytest to verify tests fail (inconsistent formats)
implementation_approach.output: 6 failing test cases for error response consistency

implementation_approach.title: Green Phase - Standardize all error responses to JSONResponse format
implementation_approach.description: Replace HTTPException with JSONResponse across all settings endpoints
modification_points: Replace raise HTTPException with return JSONResponse({'success': False, 'error': message})
Add success:true with data field to all success responses
Add details field to validation error responses
logic_flow: Update success responses to include 'data' field
Run pytest to verify all 6 tests pass
implementation_approach.output: Standardized error response format across all endpoints

implementation_approach.title: Refactor Phase - Extract response builder helper functions
implementation_approach.description: Refactor to reduce duplication in response construction
modification_points: Extract 2 helper functions: success_response(data) and error_response(message, details=None)
Update 6 endpoints to use helper functions
Add type hints for response helpers: -> JSONResponse
logic_flow: Run pytest novel_agent/tests/ -v to ensure no regressions
